programme.title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
programme.desc: S1 , E326 : Swanandi and Samar marry for convenience. Over time, their bond deepens with trust, love, and understanding, proving that love can grow unexpectedly.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: S1 , E525 : Lakshmi is a brave woman in a traditional family. Her husband, Shriniwas, wants to build his dream house. Lakshmi supports him and faces challenges with strength.

programme.title: Tula Japnar Aahe
programme.desc: S1 , E456 : Manjiri is exposed and thrown out of the house by Atharva. Following this shocking confrontation, Meera reveals a terrifying truth to him by claiming that the woman is a witch.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E1476 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Baazi
programme.desc: An honest officer is framed for murder when he starts investigating a case. However, he manages to escape from prison and goes undercover as a woman to unravel the conspiracy.

programme.title: Sokaler Sure
programme.desc: S1 , E3 : Talented singers and artists perform some of the most popular devotional and folk songs of Bengali music and enthral the audience with their performance.

programme.title: Biswasghatak
programme.desc: Prashanta loses everything when his employee Aditya deceives him during a difficult time. Years later, Aditya's son falls for Prashanta's daughter and things take an ugly turn.

programme.title: Badnam
programme.desc: Mathur Ghosh's cruelty drives Haranath to suicide. Years later, Haranath's son Shankar grows up determined to avenge his father's death by seeking justice against the evil Mathur Ghosh.

programme.title: Geet Sangeet
programme.desc: Abandoning his affluent background, a man chases his musical dreams. However, he finds himself employed as a driver and becomes smitten with his boss's daughter.

programme.title: Suorani Duorani
programme.desc: The king of Kishangarh marries a girl, unaware that she is a demoness. Upon learning the truth about his stepmother, the prince decides to save his father and their kingdom from her evil plans.

programme.title: Bhalobasar Rajprasade
programme.desc: Bikas, a rich boy falls in love and gets married to Krishna. However, Krishna is constantly tortured by Bikas' family members.

programme.title: Deya Neya
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman's son, Prasanta, dreams of becoming a famous singer. But when his ambition guides him to Kolkata, love is waiting for him around the corner.

programme.title: Shohorer Ushnotomo Din E
programme.desc: Shohorer Ushnotomo Din E

programme.title: Sos Kolkata
programme.desc: ATS officer Zakir Ahmed races against the clock to conduct a deadly rescue mission when a group of terrorists attacks a luxurious hotel.

programme.title: Sokaler Sure
programme.desc: S1 , E4 : Talented singers and artists perform some of the most popular devotional and folk songs of Bengali music and enthral the audience with their performance.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev

programme.title: Race
programme.desc: The relationship between two stepbrothers develops cracks when they fall in love with the same woman. As a result, the younger brother tries to kill the other and inherit the insurance money.

programme.title: Bollywood Calling
programme.desc: Patrick Stormaire, an ill, alcoholic American film director sets out to make a Bollywood movie. However, when he arrives in India, he learns that the script is yet to be written.

programme.title: Faraaz
programme.desc: Five terrorists take the staff and customers of Holey Artisan café in Dhaka hostage. Faraaz and his friends are among the hostages as the police try to de-escalate the situation.

programme.title: Cirkus
programme.desc: Two sets of identical twins are separated at birth and grow in two different cities. Years later, chaos ensues when one set of twins decides to visit the town where the other runs a circus.

programme.title: Bheed
programme.desc: A policeman, a victim of bigotry, takes on the task of preventing migrants from crossing state borders during a major health crisis. However, tensions arise as the ground reality of prejudice emerges.

programme.title: Forensic
programme.desc: A police inspector and an eccentric forensic expert investigate the murders of young girls and follow the trail of an unusual serial killer.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Inspector Chulbul Pandey oversees the operations of the local police station in Kanpur. However, things take a turn when he kills the brother of a local politician.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Mumbai Dobaara
programme.desc: Shoaib becomes the new mafia leader after killing his mentor, Sultan Mirza. He later finds a protégé in Aslam, but trouble ensues when they both fall in love with the same woman, Jasmine.

programme.title: Main Tera Hero
programme.desc: Seenu and Sunaina fall in love after he saves her from a violent policeman. However, their love story takes a turn when a gangster's daughter wants to marry Seenu.

programme.title: Haider
programme.desc: Haider returns to Kashmir to investigate his father's disappearance. Driven by the urge to find answers, he takes unconventional measures, unaware of the secrets of the past that await him.

programme.title: A Wednesday!
programme.desc: Prakash Rathod, a retired police commissioner, recounts the most memorable case of his career wherein he was informed about a bomb scare in Mumbai by an ordinary commoner.

programme.title: Bholaa
programme.desc: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.

programme.title: Veerappan
programme.desc: Veerappan, a teenager, trains under his uncle to learn to smuggle and becomes a dacoit. When the police attempts to arrest him for his activities, he plans to make an escape.
